title: Karnataka Budget Explorer
description: Explore the best of Karnataka on a budget covering Bangalore and Mysore. Visit iconic landmarks, lush gardens, and the majestic Mysore Palace without breaking the bank. Perfect for solo travelers and backpackers seeking authentic Karnataka experiences.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in budget hotels/guesthouses
Daily breakfast
All intercity transfers by AC sleeper bus
Sightseeing by shared auto/local transport
Entry fees to monuments

days.title: Arrival in Bangalore – Garden City Highlights
days.image: Lalbagh Botanical Garden Bangalore morning
activities: 9:00 AM - Explore Lalbagh Botanical Garden and its glass house
12:00 PM - Visit Vidhana Soudha and Cubbon Park
4:00 PM - Evening stroll at ISKCON Temple, Rajajinagar

days.title: Bangalore Local Sightseeing
days.image: Bangalore city market Tipu Sultan summer palace
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit Tipu Sultan's Summer Palace and Bangalore Fort
12:00 PM - Explore busy Commercial Street for local shopping
4:00 PM - Drive to Mysore by AC bus (depart evening)

days.title: Mysore – The Royal City
days.image: Mysore Palace illuminated Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit the magnificent Mysore Palace and its grand interiors
12:00 PM - Climb Chamundi Hills and see the giant Nandi bull
4:00 PM - Stroll through Devaraja Market for local spices and flowers

days.title: Mysore – Gardens and Silk
days.image: Brindavan Gardens Mysore musical fountain
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit Mysore Zoo, one of India's oldest zoos
12:00 PM - Tour a government silk weaving unit and witness silk saree making
4:00 PM - Evening visit to Brindavan Gardens for the musical fountain show

days.title: Return to Bangalore – Departure
days.image: Bangalore modern cityscape UB City
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive back to Bangalore (3 hours)
12:00 PM - Visit UB City mall area for last-minute shopping
4:00 PM - Transfer to airport/railway station for departure

title: Karnataka Family Fun & Discovery
description: A wholesome family journey spanning Bangalore, Mysore, and Coorg designed for all age groups. Enjoy elephant interactions at Dubare, the wonder of Mysore Palace, and scenic coffee estates in Coorg. This itinerary balances adventure, culture, and leisure for a memorable family vacation.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in family rooms at 3-star hotels
Daily breakfast and dinner
All intercity transfers by private AC vehicle
Elephant interaction at Dubare Elephant Camp
Entry fees and guided tours

days.title: Arrival in Bangalore – City Discovery
days.image: Cubbon Park Bangalore family outing
activities: 9:00 AM - Morning walk in Cubbon Park and visit Bangalore Aquarium
12:00 PM - Explore ISKCON Temple and its heritage museum
4:00 PM - Evening fun at Lalbagh Botanical Garden with kids

days.title: Bangalore to Mysore – Royal Splendor
days.image: Mysore Palace Karnataka royal architecture
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive to Mysore (3 hours) via Srirangapatna
12:00 PM - Explore the grand Mysore Palace and its royal collection
4:00 PM - Visit Mysore Zoo with family and kids

days.title: Mysore – Hills, Gardens and Markets
days.image: Chamundi Hills temple view Mysore Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive up Chamundi Hills, visit Sri Chamundeshwari Temple
12:00 PM - Shopping at Devaraja Market – spices, silk and sandalwood
4:00 PM - Evening visit to Brindavan Gardens and musical fountain show

days.title: Mysore to Coorg – Coffee Country
days.image: Coorg coffee estate misty hills Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive from Mysore to Coorg (Madikeri) – 3 hours
12:00 PM - Check in and guided walk through a coffee estate
4:00 PM - Visit Raja's Seat garden for sunset views over Coorg valleys

days.title: Coorg – Elephants, Waterfalls and Monastery
days.image: Dubare Elephant Camp Coorg Karnataka river
activities: 9:00 AM - Dubare Elephant Camp – feed, bathe and interact with elephants
12:00 PM - Visit Abbey Falls surrounded by coffee plantations
4:00 PM - Explore Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple) at Bylakuppe

days.title: Coorg to Bangalore – Departure
days.image: Coorg misty morning drive Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Morning coffee estate walk and breakfast
12:00 PM - Drive back to Bangalore (4.5 hours)
4:00 PM - Transfer to airport/railway station for departure

title: Karnataka Romantic Escape – Coorg & Mysore
description: A dreamy honeymoon journey through the mist-covered hills of Coorg and the royal grandeur of Mysore. Stay in boutique plantation resorts, share candlelit dinners amidst coffee estates, and witness the illuminated Mysore Palace together. This romantic getaway is curated for newlyweds seeking intimacy and beauty.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in boutique/heritage hotels with couple rooms
Daily breakfast and romantic candlelit dinner
All transfers by private AC vehicle
Couples spa session at Coorg resort
Flower decoration and welcome amenities on arrival

days.title: Arrival in Coorg – Misty Plantation Welcome
days.image: Coorg coffee plantation misty romantic Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Arrive in Coorg, check in to boutique plantation resort
12:00 PM - Leisurely walk through coffee and spice estates hand in hand
4:00 PM - Sunset at Raja's Seat with panoramic valley views

days.title: Coorg – Waterfalls and Golden Temple
days.image: Abbey Falls Coorg lush green Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit Abbey Falls – romantic stroll through plantation trails
12:00 PM - Explore Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple) at Bylakuppe
4:00 PM - Couples spa and wellness session at the resort

days.title: Coorg – Elephants and Scenic Drives
days.image: Dubare Elephant Camp riverside Coorg Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Dubare Elephant Camp – morning elephant interaction on Cauvery riverbank
12:00 PM - Scenic drive to Talacauvery, source of river Cauvery
4:00 PM - Private candlelit dinner at resort amidst coffee estate

days.title: Coorg to Mysore – Royal Heritage
days.image: Mysore Palace illuminated evening Karnataka romantic
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive from Coorg to Mysore (3 hours)
12:00 PM - Check in to heritage hotel, visit Mysore Palace
4:00 PM - Evening at Brindavan Gardens – illuminated fountain show

days.title: Mysore – Romance in Royal City
days.image: Chamundi Hills Mysore temple Karnataka sunrise
activities: 9:00 AM - Sunrise visit to Chamundi Hills temple
12:00 PM - Silk saree shopping at government silk emporium for spouse
4:00 PM - Horse-drawn carriage ride around Mysore Palace with dinner

days.title: Mysore to Bangalore – Farewell
days.image: Bangalore city sunset romantic rooftop Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Morning leisure at hotel, late checkout
12:00 PM - Drive to Bangalore (3 hours)
4:00 PM - Romantic rooftop dinner at UB City before departure

title: Karnataka Adrenaline Rush – Dandeli, Coorg & Chikmagalur
description: Dive into the wild heart of Karnataka across Dandeli's Kali River rapids, Coorg's lush jungle trails, and Chikmagalur's misty peaks. White water raft, trek to the highest point in Karnataka, and do wildlife safaris through dense forests. An unmissable adventure for thrill-seekers.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in jungle camps and adventure resorts
Daily breakfast and dinner
All intercity transfers by private AC vehicle
White water rafting session on Kali River Dandeli
Wildlife safari in Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary
exclusions: Tips and any additional adventure activities

days.title: Arrival in Dandeli – Into the Wild
days.image: Dandeli jungle camp Kali River Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Arrive in Dandeli, check in to riverside jungle camp
12:00 PM - Kayaking on the calm stretches of Kali River
4:00 PM - Evening nature walk and bird watching in Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary

days.title: Dandeli – White Water Rafting and Safari
days.image: White water rafting Kali River Dandeli Karnataka adventure
activities: 9:00 AM - Thrilling white water rafting on Class III-IV rapids of Kali River
12:00 PM - Jeep safari through Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary spotting gaur, leopard
4:00 PM - Bonfire and overnight jungle camp experience

days.title: Dandeli to Coorg – Jungle Trails
days.image: Coorg trekking trail forest Karnataka adventure
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive from Dandeli to Coorg (approx 4 hours)
12:00 PM - Check in and trek to Brahmagiri Wildlife Sanctuary viewpoint
4:00 PM - Rappelling and zip-lining at adventure park near Madikeri

days.title: Coorg – Waterfalls Trek and Elephant Camp
days.image: Coorg Abbey Falls trekking adventure Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Trekking trail through coffee plantations to Abbey Falls
12:00 PM - Dubare Elephant Camp – elephant bathing and mahout experience
4:00 PM - Cycling through Coorg countryside villages

days.title: Chikmagalur – Peak Conquest
days.image: Mullayanagiri peak trek Chikmagalur Karnataka sunrise
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive to Chikmagalur and trek Mullayanagiri (1930m, highest peak in Karnataka)
12:00 PM - Visit Baba Budangiri sacred hills and explore coffee estates
4:00 PM - Sunset trek at Hebbe Falls trail through shola forests

days.title: Chikmagalur to Bangalore – Departure
days.image: Chikmagalur coffee estate morning Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Morning mountain biking on Chikmagalur trails
12:00 PM - Drive to Bangalore (5 hours)
4:00 PM - Transfer to airport/railway station for departure

title: Royal Karnataka – A Luxury Odyssey
description: Indulge in the finest of Karnataka across a curated 7-day luxury tour spanning Bangalore, Mysore, Coorg, and Hampi. Stay in heritage palaces, dine on gourmet cuisine, and experience Karnataka's culture with private guides and exclusive access. A premium journey for discerning travelers seeking opulence and authenticity.
inclusions: 6 nights accommodation in 5-star heritage hotels and luxury resorts
Daily breakfast and dinner at fine dining restaurants
All transfers by private luxury AC vehicle with chauffeur
Private guided tours at all monuments
Couples spa, elephant experience, and hot stone massage included

days.title: Arrival in Bangalore – Luxury City Experience
days.image: Bangalore luxury hotel rooftop city view Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Check in to 5-star luxury hotel in central Bangalore
12:00 PM - Private guided tour of Lalbagh Botanical Garden and Vidhana Soudha
4:00 PM - Exclusive evening dining at rooftop restaurant, UB City

days.title: Bangalore to Mysore – Heritage in Grandeur
days.image: Mysore Palace luxury Karnataka royal heritage
activities: 9:00 AM - Private chauffeur transfer to Mysore (3 hours)
12:00 PM - Exclusive Mysore Palace private after-hours tour with royal curator
4:00 PM - Chamundi Hills sunset visit and dinner at heritage palace hotel

days.title: Mysore – Silk, Gardens and Royal Leisure
days.image: Brindavan Gardens illuminated Mysore luxury Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Private silk saree selection experience at government silk factory
12:00 PM - Gourmet South Indian lunch at heritage restaurant
4:00 PM - Private boat ride at Brindavan Gardens with illuminated fountain show

days.title: Mysore to Coorg – Plantation Luxury
days.image: Coorg luxury resort coffee estate Karnataka misty
activities: 9:00 AM - Scenic drive to Coorg through the Ghats (3 hours)
12:00 PM - Check in to award-winning luxury plantation resort
4:00 PM - Private coffee estate tour with planter, followed by spa treatment

days.title: Coorg – Nature and Wellness
days.image: Dubare Elephant Camp luxury experience Coorg Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Exclusive Dubare Elephant Camp private elephant bathing experience
12:00 PM - Abbey Falls private guided nature walk and picnic lunch
4:00 PM - Luxury Ayurvedic hot stone massage at resort spa

days.title: Hampi – Ancient Ruins in Splendor
days.image: Hampi Virupaksha Temple sunset Karnataka UNESCO
activities: 9:00 AM - Fly/drive to Hampi, check in to riverside luxury tented resort
12:00 PM - Private guided tour of Virupaksha Temple and Vittala Temple with Stone Chariot
4:00 PM - Sunset coracle ride on Tungabhadra River with private guide

days.title: Hampi Exploration and Departure
days.image: Hampi boulder landscape Achyutaraya Temple Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Morning visit to Achyutaraya Temple and Hampi Bazaar ruins
12:00 PM - Gourmet farewell lunch at resort
4:00 PM - Transfer to Hubli or Bellary airport for departure

title: Karnataka Cultural Heritage Trail – Hampi, Badami & Mysore
description: Journey through the extraordinary cultural landscape of Karnataka from the Vijayanagara empire ruins at Hampi to the early Chalukya cave temples of Badami, Aihole, and Pattadakal. Conclude with the royal city of Mysore and its UNESCO-listed palace. A must for history lovers and architecture enthusiasts.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in heritage and comfortable hotels
Daily breakfast
All intercity transfers by private AC vehicle
Certified archaeology guide at Hampi and Badami
Entry fees to all monuments

days.title: Arrival in Hampi – Vijayanagara Grandeur
days.image: Virupaksha Temple Hampi Karnataka UNESCO heritage
activities: 9:00 AM - Arrive in Hampi, check in and visit Virupaksha Temple complex
12:00 PM - Guided walk through the ancient Hampi Bazaar and Hemakuta Hill temples
4:00 PM - Sunset at Vittala Temple with iconic Stone Chariot and musical pillars

days.title: Hampi – Royal Enclosure and River Crossing
days.image: Tungabhadra River coracle ride Hampi Karnataka
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit Zenana Enclosure, Lotus Mahal and Elephant Stables
12:00 PM - Explore Achyutaraya Temple and the queen's bath
4:00 PM - Traditional coracle ride on Tungabhadra River to Hippie Island

days.title: Hampi to Badami – Chalukya Cave Temples
days.image: Badami cave temples Chalukya Karnataka red sandstone
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive from Hampi to Badami (2.5 hours)
12:00 PM - Guided tour of Badami cave temples – 6th century rock-cut Chalukya architecture
4:00 PM - Visit Aihole (cradle of Indian architecture) and Pattadakal UNESCO World Heritage temples

days.title: Badami to Mysore – Royal City
days.image: Mysore Palace illuminated Karnataka royal night
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive to Mysore via Hubli (6 hours with stops)
12:00 PM - Arrive Mysore, freshen up and visit Mysore Palace
4:00 PM - Sunday/holiday special: Mysore Palace full illumination evening (if applicable)

days.title: Mysore – Temples and Departure
days.image: Chamundi Hills Mysore Karnataka morning temple
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit Sri Chamundeshwari Temple on Chamundi Hills
12:00 PM - Tour government silk weaving unit and Jaganmohan Palace art gallery
4:00 PM - Transfer to Mysore railway station or Bangalore for departure

title: Mysore & Coorg Weekend Escape
description: A perfectly packed weekend getaway from Bangalore covering the royal city of Mysore and the misty hills of Coorg. Visit the iconic Mysore Palace, drive up Chamundi Hills, and breathe in the fresh air of Coorg's coffee estates. Ideal for a quick rejuvenating break from city life.
inclusions: 2 nights accommodation (1 night Mysore, 1 night Coorg)
Daily breakfast
All transfers by private AC vehicle
Mysore Palace entry and Coorg coffee estate guided walk
All applicable taxes

days.title: Bangalore to Mysore – Royal Welcome
days.image: Mysore Palace Karnataka royal weekend getaway
activities: 9:00 AM - Early morning drive from Bangalore to Mysore (3 hours)
12:00 PM - Visit Mysore Palace and Devaraja Market for sandalwood and silk
4:00 PM - Drive up Chamundi Hills for sunset views and temple visit

days.title: Mysore to Coorg – Coffee Hills
days.image: Coorg coffee estate mist Karnataka weekend
activities: 9:00 AM - Drive from Mysore to Coorg/Madikeri (3 hours)
12:00 PM - Check in to coffee estate resort and guided plantation walk
4:00 PM - Visit Raja's Seat garden for panoramic sunset over Coorg valleys

days.title: Coorg – Abbey Falls and Return
days.image: Abbey Falls Coorg Karnataka morning waterfall
activities: 9:00 AM - Morning visit to Abbey Falls through coffee estate trails
12:00 PM - Quick stop at Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple) Bylakuppe
4:00 PM - Drive back to Bangalore (4.5 hours) for departure
